Platform Tour

See Zonar OS™ In Action

The agentic AI operating layer that replaces 12–20 disconnected tools, closes revenue leaks, and runs your business intelligence 24/7 — automatically.

Watch the Tour Access Live Sandbox

  • 12–20 disconnected tools
  • Revenue leaking through gaps
  • Decisions made on stale data
  • No cross-department visibility

Guided Tour
4 modules. One operating system.

Zonar OS™ is built on four core modules that work together — each one solving a different piece of the revenue leak problem.

1

The Diagnostic Engine

Before Zonar OS™ does anything, it diagnoses. In the first 24 hours it scans every connected system and produces your Zonar Readiness Score — a 0–100 rating across revenue health, operational efficiency, people capacity, and growth pipeline.

  • Automated scan of all connected tools and data sources
  • Zonar Score broken down by department and category
  • Revenue leak quantified in AED — not just flagged
  • Priority action list ranked by business impact
Zonar OS™ — Diagnostic Engine
Your Zonar Readiness Score
74
⚠ Revenue leaks detected — AED 340,000 at risk
Revenue Health68/100
Operational Efficiency81/100
People & Capacity66/100
Growth Pipeline88/100
2

The Integration Layer

Zonar OS™ connects to every tool your business already uses — CRM, ERP, finance, marketing, HR, operations. No ripping and replacing. No data migration. It reads everything, unifies it, and starts surfacing insights within 24 hours.

  • Native connectors for Salesforce, HubSpot, SAP, QuickBooks, and 40+ more
  • No-code setup — connected in hours not weeks
  • Real-time data sync — always current
  • Your data stays in your systems — Zonar OS™ reads, never stores raw records
Zonar OS™ — Integration Layer

📊

💬

➕
+ 32 more
Available
✓ Last sync: 4 minutes ago · All systems healthy
3

Intelligence Orchestration

This is where Zonar OS™ earns its name. It doesn't just surface data — it orchestrates responses. When a revenue leak is detected, it generates the action, assigns the owner, sets the deadline, and follows up automatically.

  • Cross-system pattern recognition — connects dots humans miss
  • Autonomous workflow triggers — no manual setup per scenario
  • Escalation logic — the right person gets the right alert
  • HALU™ is the agent layer that operates inside this module
Zonar OS™ — Orchestration Engine
Active Orchestrations — Today
Sales pipeline refresh — 12 stalled deals reactivated
Triggered 09:14 · Assigned to Sarah · AED 340K recovered
DONE
Finance bottleneck — 8 invoices escalated to Director
Triggered 10:32 · In progress · Awaiting approval
IN PROGRESS
Marketing attribution gap — CRM sync initiated
Triggered 11:05 · Syncing HubSpot + Salesforce
IN PROGRESS
Weekly health report — scheduled 17:00
Auto-generates · Delivered to leadership team
SCHEDULED
4

Deployment Tiers — Start Where You Are

Zonar OS™ scales with your business. Start with HALU™ Lite to prove value quickly, upgrade to the full platform when you're ready. One-time deployment cost. Annual support. No per-user licensing.

  • HALU™ Lite free with every Zonar OS™ deployment
  • One-time cost — not a subscription trap
  • Go live in 2–4 weeks from contract to first insight
  • Dedicated Neural Horizons AI consultant throughout
Zonar OS™ — Deployment Options
Starter
HALU™ Lite
Free
Included with any plan
  • 3 departments
  • Weekly reports
  • Core alerts
